turns.thought: The swarm has completely collapsed into a premature convergence state: no improvement for 200 iterations, diversity near zero, all velocities zero, and all particles share the same fitness. A strong diversity injection is required. Resetting the worst particles by randomly reinitializing them across the search space is the most effective way to escape this local optimum and restore search capability.
turns.observation: Action 'reset_worst_particles' was applied. Reinitialized 8 weak particles to restore diversity. Best cost changed from 9.836665e-02 to 9.836665e-02 (delta=+0.000000e+00).

turns.thought: The reset successfully reinitialized 8 particles, injecting diversity into the collapsed swarm. As expected, the global best value did not change immediately because the reset only affected the worst particles, leaving the incumbent solution untouched. Whether the new particles can discover a better region or whether the swarm will collapse again depends on the upcoming iterations. It is too early to apply another intervention; I will observe the next state before deciding on further action.
